prompt: Fix routing-table spacing and reject local IP ARP entries
note: Added blank lines after the general routing-table header and final route. ARP now rejects and removes entries whose sender IP is a VVRP local interface address while still allowing other IPs that use the same MAC; runtime refresh purges stale local-IP entries. 308 tests pass.
decisions: Enforce the local-address invariant in ARP table writes and refresh cleanup rather than filtering show output
Identify local ARP entries by local IPv4 address only, never by matching the interface MAC
